## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential partnership between N-Able and GrowthX, focusing on content strategy and ROI modeling.](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week sprint model followed by a 6-12 month engagement, with pricing ranging from $9K-$15K/month based on content volume and complexity](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [N-Able is pivoting towards becoming a security brand and expanding into the SME market, seeking content strategies to increase brand visibility](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves creating detailed AI-ready artifacts, persona development, and content calibration to ensure alignment and effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [ROI measurement complexity increases with the impact of generative AI, requiring new approaches to track incrementality and brand impact](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Engagement Model and Pricing

  - [8-week initial sprint for deep strategy development and artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Opt-out option available at the end of the sprint](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Post-sprint engagement typically 12 months, but flexible to 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Pricing ranges from $9K/month (5 articles/week) to $15K/month (10+ articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Higher-end engagements ($15K+) include 100+ programmatic pages, 15+ editorial pieces, and custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### N-Able's Market Position and Goals

  - [Historically strong product-market fit in expanding MSP industry](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Current challenges: saturated MSP market, need to move up the funnel](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Pivoting to target small/medium enterprises (SMEs) in specific verticals](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Aiming to establish N-Able as a recognized security brand](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Seeking content strategies to increase visibility and consideration](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### GrowthX's Strategic Process

  - [Comprehensive initial brief creation (elevator pitch, ICPs, personas, jobs-to-be-done)](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Deep dive into persona archetypes, including psychological factors](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Development of content roadmap and calibration process](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Artifact creation for AI-readiness and consistent content production](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Typical timeline: 5-8 weeks for critical artifacts and roadmap setting](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Emphasis on finding 2+ high-conviction focus areas plus an experimentation lane](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

### ROI Measurement and Challenges

  - [Complexity in measuring impact, especially with generative AI involvement](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [Need to consider incrementality of channels like direct traffic and brand searches](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Exploration of tools like HockeyStack and Upside for synthesizing insights from multiple sources](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Importance of adapting measurement approaches to capture full impact of content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [N-Able team (Andrew, Prof, Nick) to review potential traffic impact and ROI models](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide additional ROI modeling information to N-Able team](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Further discussion on how GrowthX's approach could help N-Able achieve its brand visibility goals](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Consider exploration of advanced analytics tools (e.g., HockeyStack, Upside) for comprehensive impact measurement](https://fathom.video/share/GeByCR4oodzpi6FzZ3HV4wx48n1yKEKz?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
